## The workflow you want

<!-- Describe the task-management story, not the implementation. Example:
"I want to review every task tagged +waiting once a week and decide which
to defer or drop." -->

## Why the existing commands aren't enough

<!-- What have you tried? Why does it fall short? -->

## Sketch of the new behaviour (optional)

<!-- Command name, flags, UI. It's fine to leave this blank and let the
maintainer propose an API. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Fits the "edit tasks as markdown" core loop
- [ ] Read-only visualisation / view
- [ ] Ecosystem integration (telescope / cmp / statusline / other)
- [ ] CLI (`bin/taskmd`) feature
- [ ] Something else — please explain
